cases.public_summary: CalDS screened 15 California homelessness nonprofits. The public records show large state housing-award exposure, one official federal charging announcement tied to a connected property transaction, and records that still need to be requested before anyone should draw a final conclusion.
strongest_supported_flags: Entities selected for closer review: Hope the Mission, Weingart Center Association, DignityMoves, The People Concern, California Supportive Housing.

Official enforcement/docket triage source: Weingart Center Association (Official enforcement or docket source, 2025-10-16): An official federal press release dated October 16, 2025 says Steven Taylor was charged with seven counts of bank fraud, one count of aggravated identity theft, and one count of money laundering, and describes a Cheviot Hills property originally acquired for...

what_this_does_not_prove: Entities selected for closer review: Hope the Mission, Weingart Center Association, DignityMoves, The People Concern, California Supportive Housing.

Main signal pattern: audit-control concerns, connected-party enforcement exposure, material public-funding exposure, rapid financial growth, payroll or wage-growth questions, spend-versus-results mismatch, executive-compensation or payroll-governance questions, and possible scope-mismatch signals.

cases.public_summary: CalDS screened 15 San Francisco homelessness nonprofits. The records show public payments, official notices or audits for some providers, and many contract, monitoring, and outcome records still needed for a full review.
strongest_supported_flags: Entities selected for closer review: Tenderloin Housing Clinic Inc, Episcopal Community Svcs of SF Inc, Five Keys Schools And Programs, Community Housing Partnership, Providence Foundation of San Francisco, United Council of Human Services, St Vincent De Paul Society of SF, Larkin Street Youth Services, Heluna Health, Tides Center, Compass Family Services, Catholic Charities, Brilliant Corners, Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corp, Hamilton Families.
